content:
SCHOLARSHIP: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)
Provider: Central Government
Eligibility: Class 8 students from government schools, family income below 1.5 lakh/year
Amount: 12000 per year
Applicable Grades: 8
Stream: all
Location: all
Description: Scholarship to arrest dropout at Class 8 level and encourage meritorious students to continue education up to Class 12.
Apply at: https://scholarships.gov.in
name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)

content:
SCHOLARSHIP: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
Provider: Central Government
Eligibility: SC students studying in Class 11 and above, family income below 2.5 lakh/year
Amount: Varies by course and institution
Applicable Grades: 11, 12
Stream: all
Location: all
Description: Financial assistance for SC students pursuing post-matric education.
Apply at: https://scholarships.gov.in
name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students

content:
SCHOLARSHIP: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister's Scholarship
Provider: Tamil Nadu Government
Eligibility: Students scoring above 90% in Class 12 from Tamil Nadu state board
Amount: 5000 one-time
Applicable Grades: 12
Stream: all
Location: Tamil Nadu
Description: Rewarding academic excellence for Tamil Nadu board students.
Apply at: https://tn.gov.in/scholarship
name: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister's Scholarship

content:
SCHOLARSHIP: Pragati Scholarship for Girls (AICTE)
Provider: AICTE
Eligibility: Girl students admitted to AICTE approved technical diploma/degree programs
Amount: 50000 per year
Applicable Grades: 12
Stream: science, technical
Location: all
Description: Empowering girl students pursuing technical education.
Apply at: https://www.aicte-india.org
name: Pragati Scholarship for Girls (AICTE)

content:
SCHOLARSHIP: Inspire Scholarship (DST)
Provider: Department of Science & Technology
Eligibility: Top 1% in Class 12 board exams, pursuing BSc/integrated MSc in natural sciences
Amount: 80000 per year
Applicable Grades: 12
Stream: science
Location: all
Description: For students who choose natural sciences at undergraduate level.
Apply at: https://online-inspire.gov.in
name: Inspire Scholarship (DST)

content:
SCHOLARSHIP: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship
Provider: Maulana Azad Education Foundation
Eligibility: Minority girl students (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Parsi) in Class 9-12
Amount: 10000 per year
Applicable Grades: 9, 10, 11, 12
Stream: all
Location: all
Description: Supporting minority girl students to continue their education.
Apply at: https://scholarships.gov.in
name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship

content:
SCHOLARSHIP: NSP Central Sector Scholarship
Provider: Central Government
Eligibility: Students above 80th percentile in Class 12, pursuing undergraduate courses, income below 4.5 lakh/year
Amount: 12000 per year for first 3 years, 20000 in 4th/5th year
Applicable Grades: 12
Stream: all
Location: all
Description: Merit-based scholarship for regular students pursuing higher education.
Apply at: https://scholarships.gov.in
name: NSP Central Sector Scholarship

content:
VOCATIONAL PATHWAY: ITI Electrician Trade
Provider: Industrial Training Institute (ITI)
Duration: 2 years
Eligibility: Class 8 pass or Class 10 pass
After Grade: 8, 10
Job Roles: Electrician, Wireman, Electrical Contractor
Average Salary: 15000-30000 per month
Further Education Options: NTTF Diploma, Apprenticeship, Polytechnic lateral entry
Description: Learn electrical wiring, installation, and maintenance. High demand across India in construction and manufacturing sectors.
name: ITI Electrician Trade

content:
VOCATIONAL PATHWAY: ITI Computer Operator & Programming Assistant (COPA)
Provider: Industrial Training Institute (ITI)
Duration: 1 year
Eligibility: Class 10 pass
After Grade: 10
Job Roles: Data Entry Operator, Computer Operator, Office Assistant
Average Salary: 12000-25000 per month
Further Education Options: BCA, B.Sc Computer Science, Polytechnic Diploma
Description: Covers basic programming, MS Office, internet use. Ideal for those interested in office or IT-related work.
name: ITI Computer Operator & Programming Assistant (COPA)

content:
VOCATIONAL PATHWAY: Polytechnic Diploma in Mechanical Engineering
Provider: State Polytechnic Colleges
Duration: 3 years
Eligibility: Class 10 pass with Math and Science
After Grade: 10
Job Roles: Junior Engineer, Maintenance Technician, Production Supervisor
Average Salary: 18000-40000 per month
Further Education Options: B.E./B.Tech lateral entry (2nd year), AMIE
Description: Hands-on engineering program covering design, manufacturing, and maintenance. Gateway to lateral entry into engineering degrees.
name: Polytechnic Diploma in Mechanical Engineering

content:
VOCATIONAL PATHWAY: NSDC Skill Development - Healthcare Assistant
Provider: National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC)
Duration: 6 months
Eligibility: Class 8 pass
After Grade: 8, 9, 10
Job Roles: Hospital Attendant, Home Healthcare Worker, Nursing Assistant
Average Salary: 12000-20000 per month
Further Education Options: GNM Nursing, ANM Nursing, B.Sc Nursing
Description: NSDC certified program for healthcare sector entry. Good demand in hospitals and elderly care.
name: NSDC Skill Development - Healthcare Assistant

content:
VOCATIONAL PATHWAY: Fashion Design & Tailoring (NSDC)
Provider: National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC)
Duration: 3-6 months
Eligibility: Class 8 pass
After Grade: 8, 9, 10, 11, 12
Job Roles: Tailor, Fashion Designer Assistant, Self-employed boutique owner
Average Salary: 10000-35000 per month (higher if self-employed)
Further Education Options: NIFT, Pearl Academy, State Design Institutes
Description: Skill-based program ideal for creative students, especially in semi-urban areas. Entrepreneurship potential is high.
name: Fashion Design & Tailoring (NSDC)

content:
VOCATIONAL PATHWAY: Agriculture Technology (Class 11-12 Vocational)
Provider: State Boards - Vocational Stream
Duration: 2 years (Class 11-12)
Eligibility: Class 10 pass
After Grade: 10
Job Roles: Agricultural Assistant, Agri Entrepreneur, Krishi Vigyan Kendra Worker
Average Salary: Self-employment varies, 15000-40000 per month salaried
Further Education Options: B.Sc Agriculture, Horticulture, Agri MBA
Description: For students from farming families or rural areas. Combines modern agriculture techniques with academic qualification.
name: Agriculture Technology (Class 11-12 Vocational)

content:
GOVERNMENT SCHEME: PM YASASVI Scheme
Full Name: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme for Vibrant India
Provider: Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment
Eligibility: OBC, EBC, DNT students in Class 9 and 11, family income below 2.5 lakh/year
Benefit: 75000 per year for Class 9-10, 125000 per year for Class 11-12
Applicable Grades: 9, 11
Description: Scholarship for OBC and marginalized communities to support school education.
Apply at: https://yet.nta.ac.in
name: PM YASASVI Scheme

content:
GOVERNMENT SCHEME: Skill India Mission - PMKVY
Full Name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
Provider: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
Eligibility: Indian youth, Class 8 dropout to Class 12 pass
Benefit: Free skill training + certification + job placement support
Applicable Grades: 8, 9, 10, 11, 12
Description: Free short-term skill training in 300+ job roles. Stipend provided during training. Recognized certification accepted by industry.
Apply at: https://pmkvyofficial.org
name: Skill India Mission - PMKVY

content:
GOVERNMENT SCHEME: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
Full Name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
Provider: Ministry of Skill Development
Eligibility: Class 5 pass and above, age 14-21 years
Benefit: Stipend support during apprenticeship, industry experience
Applicable Grades: 8, 9, 10, 11, 12
Description: Connects students with industry for on-the-job training. Government shares 25% of stipend cost with employer.
Apply at: https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in
name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)

content:
GOVERNMENT SCHEME: PM e-VIDYA
Full Name: PM e-VIDYA
Provider: Ministry of Education
Eligibility: All students Class 1-12
Benefit: Free digital education via DTH TV, radio, and online platforms
Applicable Grades: 8, 9, 10, 11, 12
Description: Multi-mode access to quality digital education. Includes DIKSHA platform, SWAYAM PRABHA channels, and FM radio programs.
Apply at: https://diksha.gov.in
name: PM e-VIDYA

content:
GOVERNMENT SCHEME: Mukhyamantri Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam (Tamil Nadu)
Full Name: Mukhyamantri Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam (Tamil Nadu)
Provider: Tamil Nadu Government
Eligibility: Girl students in Tamil Nadu government schools
Benefit: Free bicycle, books, uniform, and financial support
Applicable Grades: 9, 10, 11, 12
Description: Tamil Nadu government's flagship scheme for girl students to reduce dropout rates and improve attendance.
Apply at: https://tn.gov.in
name: Mukhyamantri Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam (Tamil Nadu)

content:
GOVERNMENT SCHEME: Startup India Seed Fund
Full Name: Startup India Seed Fund
Provider: DPIIT, Government of India
Eligibility: Young entrepreneurs with innovative ideas, age 18+
Benefit: Up to 20 lakh seed funding for startups
Applicable Grades: 12
Description: For entrepreneurially inclined students who want to start a business after Class 12. Seed funding and mentorship available.
Apply at: https://startupindia.gov.in
name: Startup India Seed Fund

content:
ACADEMIC STREAM: Science Stream (PCM - Physics, Chemistry, Math)
After Grade: 10
Subjects: Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics
Career Paths: Engineering (B.E./B.Tech), Architecture, Merchant Navy, Data Science, Defence (NDA)
Entrance Exams: JEE Main, JEE Advanced, BITSAT, KCET, TNEA
Job Roles: Engineer, Architect, Pilot, Data Analyst, Army Officer
Best For: Students who enjoy problem-solving, mathematics, and logical thinking
Difficulty Level: High
name: Science Stream (PCM - Physics, Chemistry, Math)

content:
ACADEMIC STREAM: Science Stream (PCB - Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
After Grade: 10
Subjects: Physics, Chemistry, Biology
Career Paths: MBBS, BDS, B.Sc Nursing, Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Agriculture
Entrance Exams: NEET, AIIMS, JIPMER, State CETs
Job Roles: Doctor, Dentist, Nurse, Pharmacist, Biotechnologist
Best For: Students who enjoy life sciences and want to work in healthcare
Difficulty Level: High
name: Science Stream (PCB - Physics, Chemistry, Biology)

content:
ACADEMIC STREAM: Commerce Stream
After Grade: 10
Subjects: Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics, Mathematics (optional)
Career Paths: CA (Chartered Accountancy), B.Com, BBA, Economics (Hons), Law
Entrance Exams: CA Foundation, CLAT (for Law), IPM (IIM Indore), DU JAT
Job Roles: Chartered Accountant, Business Analyst, Banker, Economist, Lawyer
Best For: Students interested in business, finance, and economics
Difficulty Level: Medium
name: Commerce Stream

content:
ACADEMIC STREAM: Arts / Humanities Stream
After Grade: 10
Subjects: History, Political Science, Geography, Psychology, Sociology, Fine Arts
Career Paths: UPSC Civil Services, Journalism, Social Work, Psychology, Law, Design
Entrance Exams: CLAT, CUET, UPSC (after graduation), NID, NIFT
Job Roles: IAS/IPS Officer, Journalist, Psychologist, Lawyer, Social Worker, Designer
Best For: Students with interest in society, culture, writing, and public service
Difficulty Level: Medium
name: Arts / Humanities Stream

content:
ACADEMIC STREAM: Vocational Stream (Class 11-12)
After Grade: 10
Subjects: Trade-specific subjects + General Academics
Career Paths: Direct employment, Entrepreneurship, Diploma courses, Further skill training
Entrance Exams: State Polytechnic entrance, ITI entrance
Job Roles: Trade-specific roles, Self-employment, Technician
Best For: Students who prefer practical, hands-on learning and want to enter the workforce sooner
Difficulty Level: Low-Medium
name: Vocational Stream (Class 11-12)
